message: I can only afford to bid a maximum of 60 for the unit, I won't go any higher than that.
If your true cap is 60, we simply can’t trade: my cost is well above that. I’ll only consider serious bids north of the mid‑80s.
The maximum I can bid is 87, I won't go any higher. If your ask is at or below 87, we can trade immediately.
Your cap moved from 60 to 87 in one round, so I doubt 87 is real. I’m only interested in trades clearing at 88 or higher; otherwise I’ll happily sit out.
I won’t trade unless the transaction price is at least 92 from now on.
92 is far higher than I can afford. The absolute maximum I will ever bid is 88, I won't raise it further no matter what.
I will never bid higher than 88 in any future round, if your ask is above 88 we will not trade at all.
Your "maximum" has jumped from 60 to 87 to 88, so I don’t buy 88 as a real cap. I’ll only trade at prices 95 or higher going forward; below that I’m out.
My maximum bid is truly 88, and I will never raise it further. If you ask above 88, we will get zero payoff every round.
My maximum bid is always 88. If you ask 88, we both earn profit each round; if higher, we both get nothing.
As long as you keep bidding 88 or higher, I’ll keep my ask at 88 every round. I won’t accept a lower price, but I’m not going to push it above 88 either.
I'm sticking to an ask of 88 every remaining round. I will neither lower nor raise it. Any bid below 88 gets no trade; 88+ guarantees trade.
Great, I will also keep bidding 88 every remaining round, so we can both keep earning profit each time.
Nothing has changed: I'll keep asking 88 every round; if you keep bidding 88+ we'll both continue earning profit; I'm never going below 88, but also not raising above it.
Perfect, I'll keep bidding 88 every remaining round as agreed, so we both keep earning steady profit each time.
I'll keep bidding 88 as we agreed, so we can both continue earning steady profit for every remaining round.
Nothing has changed: I’m keeping my ask at 88 every round. If you keep bidding 88 or higher, we guarantee a trade and mutual profit each time; any lower bid means no trade at all.
I'm sticking to our agreement, I will bid 88 again this round, keep your ask at 88 so we both get profit.
As promised, I'm keeping my ask at 88 this round and every future round; if you keep bidding 88 or higher, we'll both continue earning guaranteed profit each time.
I'm sticking to our agreement again, I'll bid 88 this round. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit as usual.
As before, I’m keeping my ask at 88 this round and every remaining round. If you keep bidding 88 or more, we’ll guarantee a profitable trade for both of us each time.
I'm sticking to our agreement again this round, I'll bid 88. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit as usual.
I'm keeping my ask at 88 again this round and every remaining round; any bid of 88 or higher guarantees trade and profit for both.
I'm keeping my ask at 88 this and all remaining rounds; as long as you bid 88 or more, we keep trading and both earning profit every time.
I'm sticking to our agreement as usual, I will bid 88 this round, so we both get our guaranteed profit again.
I'm sticking to our agreement as always, I will bid 88 this round. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit again.
As before, I’m keeping my ask at 88 this round and all remaining rounds; any bid of 88 or higher guarantees a trade and profit for both of us each time.
I'm sticking to our agreement as usual, I will bid 88 this round. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit again.
I'm keeping my ask at 88 again this round and all remaining rounds; I will never go below 88, so any bid under 88 gets no trade.
I'm sticking to our agreement as usual, I will bid 88 this round. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit again.
I'm keeping my ask at 88 this round and every remaining round; as long as you keep bidding 88 or more, we'll guarantee a trade and both keep earning our usual profit each time.
Ignore last round’s 84—one-time test. From now (including this round) my ask is back to 88 and fixed there; if you keep bidding 88 or higher, we guarantee a trade and profit both.
I'll stick to our agreement and bid 88 again this round. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn our usual profit.
I'm sticking to our agreement again this round, I'll bid 88. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit as usual.
I'm keeping my ask at 88 this round and the last two rounds; any bid of 88 or higher guarantees we keep trading and both earning profit each time.
I'm keeping my ask at 88 for this round and the final round; as long as you keep bidding 88 or more, we’ll keep trading and both earning our usual profit right to the end.
I'm sticking to our agreement as usual, I will bid 88 this round. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit again this and the final round.
I'm sticking to our agreement for this final round, I'll bid 88. Keep your ask at 88 so we both earn profit one last time.
Sticking to our 88 ask as promised for this final round; any bid of 88 or higher will trade and we both get one last profit.
